channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Loose paving slab, 12th March
item.description:
Many years

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tivoli Circus, Tivoli, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on pavement near private bins on pavement, 12th March
item.description:
Fly tipping on pavement near private bins on pavement. Outside 235 Gloucester Road flats

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 231-235, Gloucester Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The whole road from the laundry to the change in speed limit is in a very dangerous state especially for cyclists. It is not clear from the previous reports what is being done as it the response seems to imply that nothing more will be done, although I may have misunderstood. Clarification on planned action would be appreciated., 12th March
item.description:
The whole stretch from the laundry to the change in speed limit especially going towards Cheltenham
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 213, Hatherley Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches snagging phone lines amplified by windy conditions, 12th March
item.description:
Several branches of the tree on the pavement directly outside 24 Keynsham Road are snagging the phone lines for 24, 26 & 28 Keynsham Road. The prevailing windy conditions are exacerbating the problem, my concern is that the lines will snap & could potentially harm a pedestrian on the pavement below

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Keynsham Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 12th March
item.description:
Outside 73 Warden Hill Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 73, Warden Hill Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Series of large potholes., 12th March
item.description:
Outside Grange farm ,Woolstone. I have reported it before and received an email today saying they had been fixed. This is not true. They have not been touched and continue to deteriorate. Dangerous as on a corner and everyone swerves to avoid them.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxenton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Five or six potholes making the road almost impassable, 12th March
item.description:
Severn Road near junction Cromwell Road. What three words https://w3w.co/long.plant.slimy

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Severn Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: (Sadly this is the best fit as zero appropriate option for this nor a 'Other'/rogue item option!) Nearside VRS/'crash barrier' is damaged due to RTC/vehicle strike and needs replacement due to deformation & resultant greatly reduced effectiveness (Inspectors.... ??). This is NOT part of NH network at this loc'n., 12th March
item.description:
A40 outbound/westbound in vicinity of 300yd marker board - virtually parallel wit the maximum/overflow extent of Cotswold BMW's carpark. This is NOT part of NH network at this loc'n.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Defective light unrepaired but ugly red barrier left around it., 12th March
item.description:
At junctioin of Wellington Road and Wellington Lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Wellington Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 12th March
item.description:
CWPH ROAD CLOSURE 1500 X 1200 X 40mm NOT MARKED (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several untaxed / MOT'd vehicles on highway, 12th March
item.description:
Concrete parking area adjacent to number 73 Golden Vale have several cars parked / abandoned without MOT/Tax. Vehicles have been present for an extended time frame. Investigation and enforcement required due to parking spaces being maintained by Gloucestershire highway.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Golden Vale, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speed cushion incorrectly positioned, 12th March
item.description:
The speed cushion westbound is not set in the middle of the lane. It is too far over forcing vehicles to cross the centre line.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Hatherley Lane, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: Green junction (?) box tipped over leaving wires exposed, 12th March
item.description:
Kidnappers Lane near the High School corner, opposite the bungalows, where Miller homes are.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kidnappers Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: No cycling sign and post removed, 12th March
item.description:
At the start of the footpath (between ‘new seekers’ and the abandoned plot) they used to be a sign pole with a no cycling sign. The sign and post would appear to have been removed entirely.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, North Road East, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is missing (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 12th March
item.description:
PLANINGS REQUIRED 38M X 500 X 100mm Aprox 2 WAY TRAFFIC LIGHTS MARKED X (CW Over-Riding)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Resident concerned about tree looking 'precarious' in the wind., 12th March
item.description:
The tree is on the west side verge along Stoke Orchard Road at the entrance to Farriers Reach.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stoke Orchard Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 12th March
item.description:
ENWD PLANINGS REQUIRED 38M X 500 X 100mm Aprox 2 WAY TRAFFIC LIGHTS MARKED X (CW Over-Riding)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 12th March
item.description:
Bigger than a dinner plate and deeper than a tennis.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wide and deep pot hole, 12th March
item.description:
There is a wide and deep pothole as the newly resurfaced stretch meets the old road surface heading into Cheltenham. I hit this at only 25mph in the dark this week and the shock made me swerve which is extremely dangerous with the fast oncoming traffic
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): B4070, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Self-seeded tree growing on footpath between Barkers Leys & Station Road. Residents worried it will fall and damage their fence, 12th March
item.description:
Closest to 89B Barkers Leys
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 89, Station Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
